Tests for the Math.exp function with various inputs including NaN, +0, -0, Infinity, and negative Infinity.


## Files
- **[15.08.02.08-001.js](15.08.02.08-001.js.md)**: Tests that `Math.exp(NaN)` returns `NaN` using an assertion.
- **[15.08.02.08-002.js](15.08.02.08-002.js.md)**: Tests the Math.exp function to verify that Math.exp(+0) returns 1.
- **[15.08.02.08-003.js](15.08.02.08-003.js.md)**: Tests the Math.exp function with an input of -0 to verify it returns 1.
- **[15.08.02.08-004.js](15.08.02.08-004.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the Math.exp function with Infinity as input.
- **[15.08.02.08-005.js](15.08.02.08-005.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of Math.exp with Infinity as input.
- **[15.08.02.08-006.js](15.08.02.08-006.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the Math.exp function with negative infinity input.
